response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: Identified the song as 'Blue World' based on on-screen text. 2. Identified performers as Nerissa Ravencroft and Tokino Sora. 3. Used web search to confirm song title, original artist, and lyrics. The song 'Blue World' is an original song by Nerissa Ravencroft (with lyrics by her and Shoji Meguro). 4. Mapped scenes: 00:00-04:27 is the main song performance. 04:27-04:59 is a spoken banter segment. 5. Prepared JSON with full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A musical performance video of the song 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft, featuring guest performer Tokino Sora. The video includes a live performance, a brief humorous interaction/banter segment, and continues the performance.

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Blue World' begins on stage. The scene features two virtual performers (Nerissa Ravencroft and Tokino Sora) singing the song with band members in the background. Musical text 'Blue World' and '#INCUTROCK' are visible on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Walking an empty road
Nowhere for me to go
Lost and lonely
Yeah it's only me
Burnt out like candle light
Left blazing through the night
Melting slowly
Until nothing else is left of me

Colored in shades of grey
Watching the days pass in front of me
Longing to find a way
I can fly away
I'm drifting through this blue, blue world

It's always been clear to me
How cruel the world can be
My shadow's the only one beside me
No love to call my own
No notifs on my phone
Sunken silence
Has engulfed the very life I lead

Colored in shades of grey
Watching the years pass in front of me
Memories I wish would stay
Always fade away
I'm lonely in this blue, blue world

Though my heart is torn
And my weary wings are worn
Just tonight, can't I dream of a better life
With happiness in sight?

Colored in shades of grey
Watching my life pass in front of me
Maybe it's not too late
If I can't escape
I'll have to make my own way
Colored in shades of grey
Palette in hand, I can make a change
I'll try to find the strength
Take a breath and paint
Bring color to this blue, blue world

scenes.description: The musical performance pauses. Nerissa Ravencroft and Tokino Sora engage in lighthearted banter on stage.
